slice: Bind browser routing state into the same audibility diagnosis recorded after the direct phone sound test.

behavior.accessibility: The existing live region now announces both diagnosis and routing status; the 44px response controls remain unchanged.
behavior.privacy: Only bounded browser runtime state is recorded; no microphone capture, device inventory, personal data, payment data, or health data is added.

verification.source_identity: The committed runtime blob was re-fetched at test commit 6f18ca3572d676b7d0ed57f9c8b847b16b828bb2 and contains the route-aware classifier and evidence schema 1.3.0.
verification.execution_status: not executed in this automation runtime; connector access exposed committed source and status APIs but no repository checkout or direct Actions dispatch

evidence_limits: Browser render evidence does not prove physical speaker emission.
Browser routing state does not prove physical speaker emission or listener perception.
A committed test is not equivalent to an executed test.
No fresh public deployment or iPhone Safari outcome was available for this commit.
